name: Westphalian Leg of Lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion until transparent.
2. Add bay leaf and buttermilk.
3. Place half the buttermilk mixture in a large baking bag with flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Place lamb in the bag and cover with remaining buttermilk mixture. Seal the bag and puncture 3-4 times.
5. Roast at 350°F until lamb reaches 165°F for medium or 180°F for well done.
6. Strain liquid from the bag and measure, adding water to make up to 1 cup if necessary.
7. Stir cornstarch into cold water. Add to strained liquid and cook over medium heat until thickened.
8. Serve sauce over sliced lamb.
